SRI LANKA INSTITUTE OF ADVANCEDTECHNICAL EDUCATION (AMENDMENT)ACT, No. 25 OF 2006
1Sri Lanka Institute of Advanced TechnicalEducation (Amendment) Act, No. 25 of 2006
[Certified on 21st August, 2006]
AN ACT TO AMEND THE SRI LANKA INSTITUTE OF ADVANCEDTECHNICAL EDUCATION ACT, NO. 29 OF 1995
BE it enacted by the Parliament of the Democratic SocialistRepublic of Sri Lanka as follows :-
1.This Act may be cited as the Sri Lanka Institute ofAdvanced Technical Education (Amendment) Act, No. 25of 2006.

2.The Long Title to the Sri Lanka Institute of AdvancedTechnical Education Act, No. 29 of 1995 (hereinafter referredto as the “principal enactment”) is hereby amended, by thesubstitution for the words “AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR THEESTABLISHMENT OF THE SRI LANKA INSTITUTE OFADVANCED TECHNICAL EDUCATION;” of the words“AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR THE, ESTABLISHMENTOF THE SRI LANKA INSTITUTE OF ADVANCEDTECHNOLOGICAL EDUCATION;”.
3.(1) In the principal enactment and in any other writtenlaw, there shall be substituted—
(a)for the words “Sri Lanka Institute of AdvancedTechnical Education” of the words “Sri LankaInstitute of Advanced Technological Education”;
(b)for the words “Advanced Technical Institute” or“Advanced Technical Institutes” of the words“Advanced Technological Institute” or “AdvancedTechnological Institutes” as the case may be.

(2) Every reference to the “Sri Lanka Institute of AdvancedTechnical Education” and “Advanced Technical Institute”or“Advanced Technical Institutes” in any notice, notificationcontract, communication or other document shall be readand construed as a reference respectively to the “Sri Lanka
Short title.
Amendment ofthe Long Title ofthe Act, No. 29of 1995.
“Sri LankaInstitute ofAdvancedTechnicalEducation” and“AdvancedTechnicalInstitute” to beknown as “SriLanka Instituteof AdvancedTechnologicalEducation” and“AdvancedTechnologicalInstitute”respectively.
Sri Lanka Institute of Advanced TechnicalEducation (Amendment) Act, No. 25 of 20062
Institute of Advanced Technological Education” and“Advanced Technological Institute” or “AdvancedTechnological Instituties” as the case may be.
4.The principal enactment is hereby amended by thesubstitution for the expression “technical” of the expression“technological” wherever that expression occurs in theprincipal enactment.
5.In the event of any inconsistency between the Sinhalaand Tamil texts of this Act, the Sinhala text shall prevail.
Substitution forthe expression“technical” of,the expression“technological”.
Sinhala text toprevail in caseof anyinconsistency.

Annual subscription of English Bills and Acts of the Parliament Rs. 885 (Local), Rs. 1,180(Foreign), payable to the SUPERINTENDENT, GOVERNM ENT PUBLICATIONS BUREAU, NO. 32, TRANSWORKSHOUSE, LOTUS ROAD, COLOMBO 01 before 15th December each year in respect of the year following.
